yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Top_Nodejs_Maintainers_Targeted_in_Sophi {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Top Node.js Maintainers Targeted in Sophisticated Social Engineering Scheme"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-04"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-09" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Hackers_Weaponize_Claude_Code_Leak_to_Sp {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Hackers Weaponize Claude Code Leak to Spread Vidar and GhostSocks Malware"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-04"
    strings:

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 140 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 128 as HIGH risk. 44 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-FIN-09. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
